extract: Dialga (Japanese: ディアルガ Dialga) is a dual-type Steel/Dragon Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Dialga transforms into its Origin Forme using the Adamant Crystal. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Form data for these details.) Along with Palkia and Giratina, Dialga is one of the Pokémon of myth created by Arceus, representing time. In the past, it was worshipped by the Diamond Clan under the name almighty Sinnoh (Japanese: シンオウ様(さま) Shin'ou-sama). Dialga is the game mascot of Pokémon Diamond Version and its remake Pokémon Brilliant Diamond, appearing on the box art of both games in its normal form.
